summary: Iteration 17 - Comprehensive testing of OEC Tech Institute LMS features. All 17 backend API tests passed. Frontend features verified: public access to courses/diplomas, admin course edit modal with thumbnail/YouTube URL fields, admin diploma students add/delete, 4-step checkout with Back buttons, OEC Tech Institute branding.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/courses - returns 9 courses without auth (public access)
Backend: GET /api/courses/{id} - returns single course details
Backend: GET /api/diploma-tracks - returns 3 tracks without auth (public access)
Backend: GET /api/reviews - works without auth (public access)
Backend: GET /api/video-testimonials - works without auth (public access)
Backend: POST /api/admin/login - successful login with correct password
Backend: POST /api/admin/login - returns 401 for wrong password
Backend: GET /api/admin/stats - returns 401 without auth
Backend: GET /api/admin/courses - returns all 9 courses with auth
Backend: PUT /api/admin/courses/{id} - partial update with image_url and intro_video_url works
Backend: GET /api/admin/diploma-enrollments - returns list with auth
Backend: POST /api/admin/diploma-enrollments/manual - fails without email (400)
Backend: POST /api/admin/diploma-enrollments/manual - fails for non-existent user (404)
Backend: DELETE /api/admin/diploma-enrollments/{id} - returns 404 for non-existent
Backend: GET /api/admin/stats - returns dashboard stats with 9 courses
Backend: Homepage load time under 2 seconds
Backend: Courses API response time under 2 seconds
Frontend: Homepage loads with OEC Tech Institute branding
Frontend: Courses page shows all 9 courses with data-testid
Frontend: Diploma tracks page loads with 3 tracks
Frontend: Admin login works with correct password
Frontend: Admin dashboard shows stats (9 courses, students, enrollments)
Frontend: Admin courses page shows 9 course cards with Edit, Outline, Delete buttons
Frontend: Admin course Edit modal opens with Title, Price, Admission Fee, Thumbnail URL, YouTube Video URL fields
Frontend: Admin course Edit modal has Save Changes button
Frontend: Admin diploma students page has Add Student button
Frontend: Admin diploma students Add modal has Email, Track, Payment Method, Status fields
Frontend: Admin diploma students page shows delete icons on enrollments
Code Review: Checkout page has 4 steps (Admission, Documents, Payment, Confirm)
Code Review: Checkout page has Back buttons on steps 2, 3, 4
Code Review: Checkout Step 1 validates required fields before Next
Code Review: Student dashboard shows OEC Tech Institute logo in sidebar
Code Review: Student dashboard shows OEC Tech Institute logo in empty state
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created - used existing data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 17 verified all 9 requested changes: 1) Dashboard logo - OEC Tech Institute logo in sidebar and empty state, 2-4) Checkout 4-step flow with Back buttons on steps 2,3,4 and Step 1 validation, 5) Admin course edit YouTube video URL field, 6) Admin course thumbnail Google Drive link field, 7) Admin diploma add/delete students functionality, 8) Google login (requires actual Google OAuth - not testable in automation), 9) Public access to courses/diplomas/reviews/testimonials APIs. All backend APIs working. Email notifications remain MOCKED.

mocked_apis_list: Email sending mocked (logs to console instead of sending real emails)

features_verified.dashboard_logo: OEC Tech Institute logo in sidebar (graduation-cap icon + text) and empty state
features_verified.checkout_4_steps: Admission → Documents → Payment → Confirm with Back buttons on steps 2,3,4
features_verified.checkout_validation: Step 1 validates: full_name, phone, date_of_birth, gender, session_type, learning_type, city, father_name, father_phone
features_verified.admin_course_edit: Edit modal with Title, Price, Admission Fee, Thumbnail URL (Google Drive), YouTube Intro Video URL
features_verified.admin_diploma_students: Add Student button with modal (email, track, payment method, status) + Delete icons on enrollments
